name: GIGABYTE B760M D3HP WIFI6 Motherboard - Supports Intel Core 14th Gen CPUs, 4+1+1 Phases Digital VRM, up to 5600MHz DDR5, 2xPCIe 4.0 M.2, Wi-Fi 6, GbE LAN, USB 3.2 Gen1
